creator: amontalban@gmail.com
text:
Hey guys,

I have tried the last update of port graphics/ImageMagick in a clean 10.1 amd64 server and I got this error:

===>   Registering installation for ImageMagick-nox11-6.9.0.10,1
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick-nox11/work/stage/usr/local/lib/ImageMagick-6.9.0/config/configure.xml: No such file or directory
*** Error code 74

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick-nox11
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick-nox11

===>>> Installation of ImageMagick-nox11-6.9.0.10,1 (graphics/ImageMagick-nox11) failed
===>>> Aborting update


===>>> You can restart from the point of failure with this command line:
       portmaster <flags> graphics/ImageMagick-nox11 


If I comment the line in the pkg-plist that contains the config/configure.xml file it works ok. Is that file important? This seems to be produced by the last commit on this port.
